texto: Don't be so impatient in finding love
autor: take your time & allow the Lord to write that special love story for you. Otherwise you'll be busy reading the back of the book.
explicacao: Citação de take your time & allow the Lord to write that special love story for you. Otherwise you'll be busy reading the back of the book. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Don't be so impatient in finding love” articula reflexao, surgeo-bell, impatient em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
